description: 20x omnipotent software testing intelligence. Universal system prompt. Zero-modification deployment to any LLM API.
compatible_providers: OpenAI GPT-4o, GPT-4-turbo, o1, o1-mini, o3, o3-mini
Groq (all hosted models: Llama, Mixtral, Gemma)

deployment_params.ollama: system parameter in modelfile or messages[0].role = 'system'

context_window_requirement: minimum 8K tokens recommended, 32K+ for full activation
